calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Trausch for Friends of The Forest. David Chon appeared by telephone for Comerica Bank.

There being no objections by either Party, the Court granted the petition admitting the will into probate, (signing the order for the same in open court). No bond is required. Ms. Trausch appeared for the purpose of expressing concerns with the trust which are to be addressed by Mr. Chon.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.
